subcodes.first_line: O blessed Leaf! His Honour the Branch of the Sacred Lote-Tree, scion of the divine Tree of the All-Merciful, is returning unto those regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه جناب فرع سدره مقدسه افنان دوحه رحمانیه عازم رجوع بان صفحات است
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
